description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design is complemented with earth tone straps and looks perfect when teamed with casuals.UpperT-strap made of earth tone leather panels with heavy stitch detailing and wooden beads for snug Fit and great eye appealSoft lining for added styleFabric lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleHeel for ergonomic comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved pattern on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
